{{Quote|Oh, he's a small one, isn't he? If you decide to leave your cell, you'll find that sungwas grow to be at least twice his size.|Gir Kybo Ren-Cha, to Gerin Toda after a sungwa attempted to attack her through the bars of her cell|<ref name="The Revenge of Kybo Ren" />}}
'''Sungwas''' were massive, [[Dog/Legends|doglike]]<ref name="CSWE" /> pack scavengers<ref name="The Revenge of Kybo Ren" /> [[Homeworld|native]] to the [[bog moon of Bogden]]. Resembling a<ref name="CSWE" /> nightmarish<ref name="Second Edition">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''</ref> cross of [[Wolf/Legends|wolf]] and [[Weasel/Legends|weasel]],<ref name="CSWE" /> they were quadrupedal creatures with [[Color/Legends|yellow]] skin covered in golden [[Hair/Legends|fur]] and a pair of red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="The Revenge of Kybo Ren" />

A pack of sungwas inhabited an [[Unidentified freighter (Bogden)|abandoned freighter]] marooned in one of the [[Moon/Legends|moon's]] [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]] that became a base of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Gir Kybo Ren-Cha]]. After [[Prison/Legends|imprisoning]] [[Gerin Toda]], the [[Gender/Legends|daughter]] of [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Malameu Toda]], aboard the [[Starship/Legends|starship]], Ren-Cha attempted to use the pack to dissuade her from escape her cell. Despite this, Toda was able to fight off the sungwas with the help of [[Jann Tosh]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], who, along with [[Jessica Meade]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], were sent by [[King/Legends|King]] [[Mon Julpa]] of [[Tammuz-an/Legends|Tammuz-an]] to liberate Toda, while R2 led away the pack and manipulated them into attacking Ren-Cha, who was pursuing the trespassers through the moldering ship's bowels.<ref name="The Revenge of Kybo Ren" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sungwas first appeared in "[[The Revenge of Kybo Ren]]," the eighth episode of the animated series ''[[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]'',<ref name="The Revenge of Kybo Ren" /> which originally aired on [[October 26]], [[1985]].<ref name="The Revenge of Kybo Ren air date">{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}</ref>
